title: pelargonium × dobraeanum
intro: Pelargonium × dobraeanum, also known as Mountain Geranium, is a hybrid of the Pelargonium genus, a group of flowering plants native to South Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of rosmarinic acid, which has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × dobraeanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
